issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing certificates or syntax errors.
The skill lacks concrete configuration snippets or runnable code, making it less directly actionable.

scenarios.name: HTTPS reverse proxy to Node.js on :3000 with HTTP-to-HTTPS redirect
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives a bare proxy_pass without forwarded headers, redirect block, TLS protocol pinning, or config test; treatment supplies all forwarded headers, a 301 redirect server block, TLSv1.2/1.3 with stapling, and validates via nginx -t && nginx -s reload.

scenarios.name: Load balance three API servers with health checks, failover, and caching
scenarios.rationale: Baseline defines a plain upstream with no health params or backup and no caching; treatment uses least_conn with max_fails/fail_timeout, a backup server, and proxy_cache_path + proxy_cache directives plus a reload test.
